title: US Supreme Court rejects Colorado's ban on LGBT conversion therapy for minors
content:
The U.S. Supreme Court has rejected a ban enacted by Colorado.
*   This ban specifically targeted LGBT conversion therapy.
*   The therapy in question was intended for minors, meaning Colorado's ban will not be implemented.

title: RoDTEP Scheme extended for six months
content:
The RoDTEP Scheme has been extended.
*   The extension is for a period of six months.
*   This ensures the continued operation of the scheme for an additional half-year.

title: SEBI fines EliteCon ₹51.2 crore on alleged insider trading
content:
SEBI, the market regulator, has imposed a significant financial penalty.
*   The fine amounts to ₹51.2 crore and has been levied against EliteCon.
*   The action was taken due to alleged insider trading activities.

title: West Asia conflict could shave off 1 percentage point from India's FY27 GDP growth projections: EY
content:
India's GDP growth projections for Fiscal Year 2027 (FY27) could be reduced by 1 percentage point.
*   This potential economic slowdown is linked to the ongoing conflict in West Asia.
*   The forecast was made by EY (Ernst & Young).

title: Lupin gets USFDA tentative nod for copy of Merck’s injection
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Lupin has received a tentative approval from the USFDA.
*   This approval is for a generic version of an injection originally developed by Merck.
*   The tentative nod signifies a step towards Lupin being able to market a copycat drug.

title: What is conversion therapy? US Supreme Court strikes down Colorado law banning it for LGBT minors
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The US Supreme Court has struck down a Colorado law.
*   This Colorado law had banned conversion therapy.
*   The ban specifically applied to LGBT minors.

title: Defence Ministry signs ₹1,950-crore deal with BEL for indigenous mountain radars
content:
The Defence Ministry has signed a ₹1,950-crore deal.
*   The contract is with Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL).
*   The agreement is for the procurement of indigenously developed mountain radars.

title: City hospital removes complex tumour located in a critical area of the brain
content:
A city hospital successfully removed a brain tumour.
*   The tumour was described as complex.
*   Its location was in a critical area of the brain.

title: Tamilselvan receives Sahitya Akademi award
content:
Tamilselvan has received an award.
*   The award is the prestigious Sahitya Akademi award.
*   This honor recognizes his contributions, likely in the field of literature.
